name: Adam Porteous
why_notable: Co-founded Assetnote with Shubham Shah — the attack surface management platform that also released the Assetnote wordlist sets as a free community resource. As business and product co-founder, built the commercial layer that funded the research infrastructure and kept the free wordlist pipeline running. The Assetnote wordlists (particularly the technology-specific endpoint lists) are now standard in professional recon tooling.
